channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: GitOps Cockpit for Argo CD - Sun May 03 08:12:08 UTC 2026
item.description:
Monitor, sync, and manage your Argo CD GitOps deployments without leaving your IDE. GitOps Cockpit brings the full power of Argo CD directly into IntelliJ IDEA. Free...
vendor: Michael Latta Software downloads: 12 pricingModel: FREEMIUM xmlId: de.ml.argocd.gitops-cockpit

item.title: Sout Boy - Sun May 03 03:46:34 UTC 2026
item.description:
SoutBoy is an IntelliJ IDEA plugin for Java developers who are tired of typing System.out.println by hand every single time they need to debug something. ☢️ SoutBoy...
vendor: Pedro Ribeiro downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.pedrorbeiro.soutboy

item.title: Groovy Live Templates - Thu Apr 30 09:34:52 UTC 2026
item.description:
Adds support for Groovy in IDE live templates.
vendor: JetBrains s.r.o. downloads: 3 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: org.intellij.groovy.live.templates

item.title: Build Sound Notifier - Thu Apr 30 09:05:45 UTC 2026
item.description:
Plays a custom sound and flashes an image overlay on build success or failure. Separate sound (WAV or MP3) and image (PNG / JPG / GIF / BMP) for success and failure...
vendor: Squaredem downloads: 5 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.squaredem.buildsoundnotifier

item.title: Codex Assistant - Thu Apr 30 07:13:11 UTC 2026
item.description:
Run Codex CLI from inside JetBrains IDE via the built-in terminal. How to Open Shortcut: Press Ctrl+Shift+X or option+command+X to open the terminal in your current...
vendor: krong downloads: 95 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.codex.assistant

item.title: Nginx Lens - Thu Apr 30 06:53:52 UTC 2026
item.description:
Nginx Lens adds focused editor support for Nginx configuration files in JetBrains IDEs. It provides syntax highlighting, inspections for common configuration mistakes...
vendor: CarlRenny downloads: 99 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.agomuseum.nginxlens

item.title: CPH Target Runner - Sat May 02 19:18:53 UTC 2026
item.description:
A CLion sidebar helper for competitive-programming samples. Manage sample cases per CMake target, run them quickly, compare outputs, and inspect mismatched lines.
vendor: kkkzbh downloads: 17 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: org.kkkzbh.cph

item.title: velk - Fri May 01 06:51:24 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: Vincent Vella downloads: 39 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.vincentvella.velk

item.title: OpenClaw - Wed Apr 29 20:58:48 UTC 2026
item.description:
OpenClaw adds a status bar launcher for the OpenClaw CLI inside JetBrains IDEs. Features OpenClaw menu from the status bar or Tools → OpenClaw: Show Menu Run...
vendor: gguf downloads: 34 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.gguf.openclaw

item.title: Inline Unified Diff - Wed Apr 29 20:44:13 UTC 2026
item.description:
Inline Unified Diff shows your uncommitted Git changes directly inside the editor — the same way a unified diff looks in a terminal — without switching to a separate...
vendor: Clement Sehan downloads: 9 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.clementsehan.inlineunifieddiffjetbrains

item.title: LuaAttachDebug - Wed Apr 29 14:10:35 UTC 2026
item.description:
Attach or launch Windows Lua processes with the Lua native debugger hook. Requires the EmmyLua plugin.
vendor: kibernet downloads: 3 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.kibernet.LuaAttachDebug

item.title: LuaUnity - Wed Apr 29 11:48:09 UTC 2026
item.description:
Receive Unity type metadata and generate Lua annotation files for IntelliJ-based IDEs. Configure the local type server under Settings | Tools | LuaUnity.
vendor: kibernet downloads: 6 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.kibernet.luaunity
